name: quick_scan_4x4_grid
description: Nexus Quick scan — Gemini-Flash triage on 4x4 grids of key slices from a 3D DICOM volume. Wraps existing Quick scan pipeline as a MONAI Bundle for uniform provenance footprint per ADR-002 Rev-6. Stage 2C of the modality-routing DICOM ingester; swaps in to remote MONAI VISTA-3D at M10 inference companion.
copyright: Copyright 2026 — internal Nexus model wrapping. The wrapped Gemini Flash model is proprietary to Google; this wrapper bundle is licensed Apache-2.0.

grid_image.description: 4x4 grid of key slices, rendered from the DICOM volume with modality-appropriate window/level

triage_report.description: Structured triage notes per slice range, with verdict/finding/urgency fields and immutable disclaimer

intended_use: Preliminary screening only. Radiologist review required. The wrapped LLM is non-deterministic; outputs are stored verbatim in ingestion_llm_response events per ADR-002 Rev-8.
limitations: Caption-only; loses what Gemini Flash misses (Rev-9 §5.5.1 failure mode 1)
No pixel-level reasoning across studies (Rev-9 §5.5.1 failure mode 2)
No visual-similarity retrieval substrate (Rev-9 §5.5.1 failure mode 3)
Replaced by remote MONAI VISTA-3D at inference companion (M10)
